title: satyrium dahlianum
intro: Satyrium dahlianum, also known as Autumn Ladies' Tresses, is a terrestrial orchid native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving congestion, and easing menstrual cramps. Traditionally, the Autumn Ladies' Tresses has been prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the roots and flowers in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
